title: Get Your Ass in the Moss
summary: A psychedelic fungal grotto — giant glowing mushrooms under blacklit trees. Poke the shrooms, then do what the title says and settle into the moss bank; the longer you stay, the deeper it gets.
notes: James's title and brief (2026-07-16), interpretation left to Claude. Cycles-rendered plates + per-mushroom sprites from a fully procedural headless Blender build (tmp/get-your-ass-in-the-moss/build_scene.py); canvas god rays, spores, and trip grade on top. Three diegetic drift exits: tree hollow, fairy ring, mist gap. Sitting in the moss is the core mechanic — a ~24s trip ramp that eases back on standing.

admin.notes: World Ideas.md #56. Draft until James approves.
